preset.hust: Hanoi University of Science and Technology

common.subject: Subject
common.slogan: Open-source application for students. Your academic data is stored 100% locally in your browser. The server only manages synchronization configurations and never collects your grades or school credentials.

entry.title: Grade Entry
entry.desc: Capture each subject's components and weights for live GPA preview.
entry.desc2: Note: Summer semester grades will be combined into Semester 2.
entry.empty: No semesters yet — add one to begin.

scale.title: Grading Scale & Reference
scale.desc: Standard reference and your institution's active mapping.

goals.title: Semester Goals
goals.desc: Tactical per-semester targets and scholarship gating.

help.inputTarget: Enter target GPA in scale 10 in the input below. The application will automatically calculate GPA in scale 4 for you.

roadmap.title: 4-Year Roadmap
roadmap.desc: Long-term GPA strategy, simulator, and analytics.
roadmap.unreachable: Target unreachable — lower target or check credits.
roadmap.secured: Target already secured. Coast to graduation.
roadmap.failed: Failed subjects (< 5.0 or Under failing threshold)

data.title: Local Data & Privacy
data.desc: All data is stored in your browser. Export, import, or clear.

export.desc: Export a JSON snapshot of your current data. Keep it safe for later import.

import.desc: Restore a previously exported JSON snapshot. Replaces current data.

clear.desc: Wipes every key the app stores in this browser. Cannot be undone.

data.privacyDesc: The app uses only browser localStorage. Nothing is sent to a server. Export regularly if data is important.

deleteAlert.confirmBody: This wipes every semester, subject, and setting from this browser. This cannot be undone.
